svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="WdLmlmQcixKolKTrMWd-"> <mxGraphModel dx="1780" dy="928" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 12
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam sequence {
 ParticipantBackgroundColor #D6E4F0
 ParticipantBorderColor #2E75B6
 LifeLineBorderColor #2E75B6
 LifeLineBackgroundColor #EAF4FB
 ActorBackgroundColor #1F4E79
 ActorBorderColor #1F4E79
 ActorFontColor White
 GroupBackgroundColor #FFF9E6
 GroupBorderColor #F57F17
 GroupFontColor #BF360C
}
skinparam ArrowColor #1F4E79
skinparam NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
skinparam NoteBorderColor #F57F17

title Parallel Web Crawler — Sequence Diagram\n(Complete Crawl Session from START to DONE)

actor \"User\" as User
participant \"MainController\n(JavaFX GUI)\" as MC
participant \"CrawlerEngine\" as CE
participant \"ExecutorService\n(Thread Pool)\" as TP
participant \"BlockingQueue\n(URL Queue)\" as BQ
participant \"ConcurrentHashMap\n(Visited URLs)\" as CH
participant \"Web Server\" as WS
participant \"StorageWriters\n(CSV+JSON+SQLite)\" as SW

== User Starts Crawl ==

User -> MC : Click START button\n(URL, depth, threads config)
activate MC

MC -> MC : Build CrawlerConfig\n(via Builder pattern)
MC -> CE : new CrawlerEngine(config)
activate CE

MC -> CE : setOnPageCrawled(callback)
MC -> CE : setOnStageComplete(callback)
MC -> CE : start()

CE -> CE : Reset state\n(clear visited, queue, results, timers)
CE -> SW : Init storage writers\n(CSV + JSON + SQLite)
CE -> BQ : queue.add(seedUrl, depth=0)
CE -> CH : visitedUrls.add(seedUrl)

note over CE : Check threadCount:\n1 → runSequential()\nN → runParallel()

CE -> TP : newFixedThreadPool(N)
activate TP

== Main Crawl Loop (Parallel) ==

loop while pageCount < maxPages AND not stopped

 CE -> BQ : drainTo(batch, N×2)\n[Stage 1: Discovery]
 BQ --> CE : batch of UrlTasks

 note over CE,TP : Stage 2: Submit ALL tasks to thread pool simultaneously

 loop for EACH task in batch (ALL run in PARALLEL)
 CE -> TP : executor.submit(crawlPageWithRetry)
 TP -> TP : Worker thread picks up task

 TP -> TP : sleep(politenessDelayMs)

 TP -> WS : HTTP GET request\n(Jsoup.connect(url).get())
 activate WS

 alt HTTP Success (200 OK)
 WS --> TP : HTML Document
 deactivate WS
 TP -> TP : [Stage 3: Extraction]\nParse: title, desc, links

 loop for each link found
 TP -> CH : visitedUrls.add(link)
 note right of CH : Atomic check+insert\nreturns true = new URL
 alt Link is NEW
 TP -> BQ : queue.offer(new UrlTask)
 end
 end

 TP --> CE : return CrawledPage (status=200)

 else IOException / Timeout
 WS --> TP : Error / No response
 deactivate WS
 note over TP : Retry Logic (Phase 2):\nattempt < MAX_RETRIES?
 TP -> WS : Retry HTTP GET (attempt 2)
 activate WS
 WS --> TP : Response or Error
 deactivate WS
 TP --> CE : return CrawledPage\n(status=200 OR status=0 if still failed)
 end
 end

 CE -> CE : futures.get(timeout)\nCollect all results

 note over CE,SW : Stage 4: Storage (concurrent)

 CE -> SW : csvStorage.save(page) [synchronized]
 CE -> SW : jsonStorage.save(page) [synchronized]
 CE -> SW : sqliteStorage.save(page) [synchronized]

 CE -> MC : onPageCrawled(page) callback
 MC -> MC : Platform.runLater() →\nUpdate table, log, stats labels

end

== Crawl Complete ==

CE -> TP : executor.shutdownNow()
deactivate TP
CE -> SW : jsonStorage.finalize(results)\n(write summary JSON)
CE -> SW : sqliteStorage.close()
CE -> MC : onStageComplete(timing message)
CE --> MC : start() returns results list
deactivate CE

MC -> MC : onCrawlComplete()\nUpdate GUI: DONE status, final stats
MC --> User : Show DONE + speedup (if benchmark mode)
deactivate MC

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="HDwSmDTa_OjxVkMHbnbk-4"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="2028" width="1412" x="270" y="960" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
